data.title: Add conversation export/import
data.description:
**Labels:** `enhancement`, `frontend`

**Description:**
Allow users to export conversations for backup or sharing, and import previous conversations.

**Proposed Solution:**
Add export/import functionality with multiple format support.

**Export Formats:**

* JSON (full conversation data)
* Markdown (readable format)
* Plain text
* HTML (styled output)

**Features:**

* Export current conversation
* Export all conversations (batch)
* Import from JSON file
* Share conversation via URL

**Acceptance Criteria:**

- [ ] Export to JSON, Markdown, and text
- [ ] Import from JSON file
- [ ] Download triggers properly
- [ ] Imported conversations validate correctly
- [ ] Option to share conversation (unique URL)

**Technical Considerations:**

* Add export/import UI buttons
* Generate downloadable files
* Validate imported data
* Optional: Store shared conversations in KV
* Privacy: Add expiry for shared links

**Effort & Value Ranking:**

* ⏱️ Time: **Low-Medium** (file generation logic, validation, UI components)
* 🧩 Complexity: **Low-Medium** (mainly frontend, validation logic, format conversion)
* 💎 Value: **Medium** (useful for backup/portability, sharing use cases)
